creator: Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de
text:
(In reply to Joerg Pulz from comment #12)

Thanks to Arne for handing over hte 26xx based adapters at the weekend.

As promised - here are the results for a 26xx based
    - QLogic ISP 2031 (QLogic QLE2662 16Gbit 2Port FC Adapter)
